case_title: PATEL, JACK vs. BAYS, TOM et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, JACK SERVED MAY-20-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAYS, TOM ANTHONY, TONY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, JACK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYS, TOM ANTHONY, TONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 172 SIXTH STREET, #507, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BAYS, TOM ANTHONY, TONY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, JACK AS TO DEFENDANT BAYS, TOM ANTHONY, TONY SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, JACK AS TO DEFENDANT BAYS, TOM ANTHONY, TONY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BAYS, TOM ANTHONY, TONY
